user.title: Yahoo Stocks
user.description: Track multiple Yahoo Finance tickers. Enter a comma-separated list like `QQQ, SPY, TQQQ`. If Yahoo rate-limits or blocks requests, try setting a custom User-Agent.

data.fast_interval: Polling seconds during market hours (Mon–Fri 9:30–16:00 ET)

init.title: Yahoo Stocks Options
init.description: Adjust your tickers, polling cadence, and User-Agent. Tickers are sorted and de-duplicated automatically on save.
